subject: Pipeline Alert: Data Product Pipeline Failed

body.content:
🚨 Pipeline Alert: The Data Product {data_product} Pipeline Execution Failed

🕒 Timestamp: {trigger_time}

📁 Fabric Workspace Name: {workspace_name}

📄 Pipeline Name: {pipeline_name}

📦 Data Product: {data_product}

⚠️ Issue: There were errors in data product {feed_name} feed pipeline. As a result, the daily pipeline was not executed. Please review the pipeline details below to help troubleshoot the errors.

🔍 Details & Links:

  • 🔗 Pipeline Run
  • 📊 Operational Dashboard - Not Implemented

🚧 Action Required: Please contact the support team for investigation and resolution.
